title: VideoPlaylistSection
description: Multi-video playlist with in-box playback: a featured player (copy beside a poster frame that swaps to a privacy-enhanced YouTube embed or self-hosted MP4 on click) over a 'Watch more' selector rail. Data-driven counterpart to the single hardcoded videoFeature. This file is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the section's shape - the TS type is generated from it (VideoPlaylist.types.ts) and the landing-page doc schema $refs it.

eyebrow.description: Charcoal pill with neon glow above the player, e.g. 'What to watch now'.

railLabel.description: Label above the selector rail. Defaults to 'Watch more'.

link.description: Optional arrow link under the featured blurb, e.g. to the related guide.

youtubeId.description: YouTube video id; played via youtube-nocookie.com. Ignored when mp4 is set.

mp4.description: Self-hosted MP4 path; takes precedence over youtubeId.
